channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Finishing strong: Palo Alto’s resilient Sophie Pan has overcome sprained ankles, a broken finger and more
item.description: Palo Alto's senior volleyball standout Sophie Pan missed 22 matches this season, the latest in a long line of setbacks for the determined college-bound middle blocker.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Monday night showdown: Oakland Tech dominates Skyline in rescheduled game following Oakland Hills fire
item.description: Prep football: Caleb Rollins totals five touchdowns as Oakland Tech defeats Skyline in rescheduled game following Oakland Hills fire.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Now that he qualifies, current Detroit Lions player is one of best in NFL history
item.description: Now that he officially qualifies, a current Detroit Lions player has cemented himself as one of the best at his position in NFL history.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Texas fined $250K for trash thrown onto field, must ID and ban fans
item.description: The SEC said it won't suspend alcohol sales at Texas events, but "reserves the right to do so if other requirements are not met.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota Lynx head coach says WNBA title was 'stolen from us' in scathing remarks about referees
item.description: Minnesota Lynx head coach Cheryl Reeve blasted officials after losing the WNBA title, saying that the championship was "stolen from us.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come. Even as the weeks passed and his aching calf struggled to get better. Even as Justin Fields deftly guided the Pittsburgh Steelers in his place.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Top 25: Oregon is No. 1 for first time since 2012; Vanderbilt enters poll and Michigan drops out
item.description: Oregon became the fourth team this season to hold the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press college football poll, moving into the top spot on Sunday for the first time in 12 years after Texas lost at home to Georgia. Vanderbilt made its first appearance since the 2013 season, at No.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Becky Sauerbrunn and over 100 women's soccer players protest FIFA deal with Saudi oil giant Aramco
item.description: ZURICH (AP) — Former U.S. national team captain Becky Sauerbrunn and Netherlands forward Vivianne Miedema are among more than 100 women's soccer players who have signed an open letter protesting FIFA's sponsorship deal with Saudi Arabian state oil giant Aramco.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Moody agrees to 3-year, $39M extension with Warriors: report
item.description: (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors and guard Moses Moody have agreed to a multi-year contract extension, ESPN's Shams Charania posted Sunday evening on X. The extension is reportedly for three years and $39 million, which is an average annual value of about $13 million.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: NFL stadiums will lose $11B from climate threats by 2050: Report
item.description: “This report is a wake-up call for the NFL, stadium owners, and local governments,” said Climate X CEO Lukky Ahmed.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Christian Barmore apologizes to Rhode Island police after racism remarks
item.description: Patriots defensive tackle Christian Barmore issued an apology on social media to the Providence Police Department after he accused officers of racism during a recent traffic stop.
item.dc:creator: Raymond Baccari, NewsNation

item.title: Lynx force Game 5 of WNBA Finals on Carleton's free throws to beat Liberty 82-80
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — With their season on the line, the Minnesota Lynx did just enough to stave off elimination and force a decisive Game 5 of the WNBA Finals. Bridget Carleton made two free throws with 2 seconds left, and the Lynx beat the New York Liberty 82-80 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: University of South Florida to support hurricane relief efforts during UAB football game
item.description: Fans who donate three or more shelf-stable items will receive a coupon for two complimentary tickets to a 2024 home football game of their choice.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cole Kmet earns NFC Special Teams Player of the Week honors
item.description: Cole Kmet was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for Week 6 after successfully snapping on all five of the Bears' point-after attempts during their game in London against the Jacksonville Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation
